name: Mojito
directions: In a tall glass, stir mint, sugar and lime juice until sugar is dissolved and stir in rum.
Add ice cubes and top off drink with club soda or seltzer water.
Stir drink well and garnish with mint and lime.

name: Blue Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender.
Fill with ice to the 5-cup level, and process until smooth.
Serve immediately.

name: Bahama Mama
directions: Shake with ice, pour into glass and serve.

name: Mojito Lemon Lime Cocktail
directions: Empty drink mix into a large pitcher, add water and rum, stir until drink mix is dissolved.
Add mint, and refrigerate until ready to serve.
Stir in club soda.
Serve over ice in tall galsses, and add a lime slice to each glass.

name: Freezer Margarita
directions: Place everything into a sealable container.
Freeze until firm.
Brake/Stir the concoction until its a yummy, slushy drink!

name: Citrus Margarita Cooler
directions: PLACE drink mix, water, orange juice and lime juice in blender container; cover.
BLEND on high speed until drink mix is dissolved.
ADD ice; cover. Blend on high speed until thickened and smooth. Serve immediately.

name: Strawberry Lemonade
directions: Hull and raise strawberries, next,put them in a blender and puree.
If using frozen sweetend strawberries skip the next step, but do thaw and blend strawberries.
While preparing strawberries, in a sauce pan combine sugar and water over medium heat to dissolve the sugar about 5-10min.
In a 2 quart pitcher add Lemonade and 1/2 cup to 1 cup sugar. Depending on your taste.
While the sugar water is still hot pour into the pitcher. Mix until all sugar is dissloved.
Add strawberries.
Fill the rest of the pitcher with cold water. Add ice or refrigderate.
***Preparation time will very depending on the time of strawberries you are using.

name: Asian Pear Mojito
directions: In a pitcher, combine the mint and lime juice.  Using a wooden spoon, muddle the mint and lime together until you can smell the fresh aroma of mint. Next add the sugar, rum, asian pear liquor and mix to dissolve sugar.  Fill the pitcher with club soda, but don't forget to leave room for lots of ice!  Add some sliced limes and mint sprigs for a wonderful looking pitcher!
Serving amount depends on size of pitcher and glasses!

name: 4th of July Martini
directions: Mix all ingredients except grenadine in shaker and chill.
Pour into martini glass.
Add grenadine and it will sink to bottom.

name: Perfect Mojito
directions: Place the mint leaves and simple syrup in a glass and muddle the mint until the leaves are crushed and the flavor is released.
Add the rum, lime juice and bitters and stir to combine.
Top with club soda and stir lightly.
Garnish with a sprig of mint and lime wedge.

name: Melon Margarita
directions: Shake up ingredients until frothy and pour into a martini glass.  You can garnish with a slice of lime or lime curls, if desired.

name: Watermelon Martini
directions: Mix all ingredients together over ice.
Shake.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with a slice of watermelon.

name: Margarita Slush
directions: Mix well.
Freeze
Mix again before serving.

name: Margaritas Made With Beer
directions: Mix all ingredients and serve over ice.
You can put this in a blender with ice if you like but be sure to leave extra room at the top of the blender since the beer will expand.
Freeze any extra and but in the blender for a true frozen style margarita next time.
Garnish with lime wedges if you like.

name: Pineapple Margarita
directions: Peel and core pineapple, cut into 2 inch chunks.
Puree in food processor with steel blade until smooth and foamy (1 minute).
Strain into shaker or pitcher, saving ½ c juice.
Add lemon, lime, and pineapple juices.
Add tequila, triple sec, and 1 cup crushed ice.
Stir or shake thoroughly, 20 to 60 seconds.
Divide 1 cup ice into sugared glasses, pour mix over.
Serve immediately.

name: Pomegranate Mojito
directions: Muddle 2 tablespoons of simple syrup (or raw sugar), 6-12 mint leaves and pomegranate seeds in a highball glass.
Fill glass with ice and add pomegranate liqueur, rum and lime juice. Top with a splash of club soda.

name: Jamaica Margaritas
directions: Place blossoms in a strainer; rinse under cold water.
Combine blossoms, water, and sugar in a medium saucepan; bring to a boil.
Reduce heat, and simmer 10 minutes. Strain; discard blossoms.
Cover and chill hibiscus mixture.
Combine hibiscus mixture, tequila, juice, and Triple Sec.
Serve over ice. Garnish with lime slices.

name: Fresh Lime Margaritas
directions: Stir all ingredients together and serve over ice cubes.

name: Frozen Mango Margarita
directions: Sprinkle the salt onto a side plate. Rub the rim of the margarita glasses with one of the lime wedges and dip the rims into the salt.
Mix all ingredients (except the salt and remaining lime wedges) in a blender until smooth.
Pour into the glasses and garnish with a fresh lime wedge.

name: Blue Bahama
directions: Mix gin, rum, vodka, tequila, triple sec, Midori, blue curacao and sour mix together.
Shake well and pour into Hurricane glass.
Then add a splash of 7-up to the top and serve.

name: Limoncello Cosmopolitan
directions: Combine vodka, cranberry juice and a splash of Caravello Limoncello in a shaker with ice.
Strain into a martini glass and garnish with a lemon wedge.

name: Mojito Slushy
directions: In a saucepan over medium heat, add the sugar and water. Cook for about 5 minutes, stirring often, until the sugar is dissolved and the syrup is clear. Set aside to cool.
Put the sugar syrup, lime juice, mint leaves, lime zest, and rum into a blender and blend until smooth. Add the ice and blend until slushy.
Spoon into glasses; garnish with a sprig of mint and a lime slice.

name: Mango Margaritas
directions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a glass.
Enjoy!

name: Tropical Sunshine
directions: Stir together with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.
Serve garnished with fresh pineapple, if desired.

name: Beer Margaritas
directions: Add all and mix it up in a pitcher.
Add some ice if you want.
and sliced limes.

name: Long Island Lemonade
directions: (Substitute for your available or favorite spirits).
Fill a cocktail shaker 2/3 full with ice.
Shake up the alcohol, lemon juice, ice, and sugar in a cocktail shaker.
Strain into a tall glass filled with ice.
Top with sprite.
Add lemon twist to garnish if you wish.

name: Cherry Vodka Limeade
directions: Fill a 16 ounce glass with ice.
Add first 4 ingredients.
Stir.
Garnish with a cherry if desired.

name: Sparkling Margarita Floats
directions: Chill 8 glasses.  In a pitcher stir together the limeade, tequila, and triple sec.  Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
Stir the tonic into the limeade mixture.  Place 1 scoop of sherbet into each of the glasses, and stir in the limeade mix.

name: Cucumber Mojitos
directions: Place 2 c water and chopped cucumber in a blender; process til smooth.  Strain through a sieve into a med bowl; discard solids.

Place 1 T sugar, 1 T lime juice, and 4 mint leaves in a 2 c glass measure; crush with a wooden spoon or muddler.  Add 3 T rum and about 1/2 c cucumber mixture; stir to dissolve sugar.  Stir in 1/4 c sparkling water.  Place 1/4 c ice in a 12 oz glass and pour mixture over.  Garnish with 1/4 of the mint sprigs, cucumber slices and lime wedges.

name: Strawberry-Lemon Mojitos
directions: Sugar syrup:  Stir 1/2 cup. of superfine sugar into 1/2 cup water until dissolved. Bring to boil and boil 2 minutes without stirring. Cool. Store covered in refrigerator.
In a cocktail shaker, muddle the lemon wedges with the whole strawberries and mint leaves. Add ice and rum, lemon juice and sugar syrup; shake well. Strain over crushed ice-filled high-ball glasses.
Garnish with the berry halves and mint sprigs.

name: Frozen Blender Mojito
directions: Place enough sugar on a small plate to reach depth of 1/4 inch.  Run lime wedge around the rim of 4 martinin glasses to moisten.  Dip rims into sugar on plate.
Blend rum or vodka and 1/3 cup sugar in blender until sugar dissolves.  Add ice, blend until smooth, adding up to 1 cup more ice, if desired.
Add 12 mint leaves and blend until green flecks appear.  Pour into prepared glasses.
Garnish with mint sprigs.
Sit back and enjoy.

name: Frozen Blender Mojito
directions: Place enough sugar on a small plate to reach depth of 1/4 inch.  Run lime wedge around the rim of 4 martinin glasses to moisten.  Dip rims into sugar on plate.
Blend rum or vodka and 1/3 cup sugar in blender until sugar dissolves.  Add ice, blend until smooth, adding up to 1 cup more ice, if desired.
Add 12 mint leaves and blend until green flecks appear.  Pour into prepared glasses.
Garnish with mint sprigs.
Sit back and enjoy.

name: Mexican Mojito
directions: In a mixing glass or shaker, muddle the mint sprigs, lime, and sugar.

Add the ice and tequila. Cap tightly, shake vigorously, and pour into a 12-ounce glass. Top the glass with soda water and top that with the lemon-lime soda. Garnish with a sprig of mint and a lime wheel.

name: Virgin Coco Mojito
directions: Pour coconut syrup and lime juice into a tall glass.
Add the mint leaves and muddle with a long spoon.
Add ice and sparkling water.
Stir gently and enjoy.

name: Mujer Libre
directions: Muddle the orange slice in the bottom of a shaker.
Add ice and the rest of the ingredients.
Shake well, and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with an edible flower.

name: Frozen Strawberry Mojitos
directions: Muddle together the mint leaves, lime juice and lime pulp.  Strain, pressing through a sieve, discarding pulp and reserving juice.
Combine together in a blender all ingredients.  Serve in frozen glasses.

name: Tequila REVOLUCION Mojito
directions: Lay 1 cucumber slice and half the mint leaves in the bottom of an old fashioned glass. Add the lime juice and ginger simple syrup and muddle the mix together. Fill the glass with ice cubes. Pour in the tequila and stir to combine. Top with club soda and garnish with remaining cucumber slices & mint leaves.

name: Cherry Berry Martini
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with several ice cubes and shake vigorously.  Strain into chilled martini glass and enjoy!

name: Pineapple Margaritas
directions: Place Ice, Pineapple, Triple Sec, Tequila, and lime juice in blender.
Squeeze Lemon and lime into blender. Careful to avoid seeds.
Blend until desired consistency
Serve in glass with rim of glass slightly salted with sugar and salt.

name: Cuban Mojito
directions: Cut a round slice of lime, 1 cm thick and slice it into 4 equal parts. Put the four lime wedges into a glass, then add the sugar and muddle (squish everything together) to release the lime juice and aroma. Do it gently because hard squishing may release the bitterness from the white part of the lime.

Put the mint leaves on one hand and clap in order to lightly bruise the leaves to releases the aroma. Rub the mint leaves around the rim of the glass and drop them inches Use a muddler, bar spoon (or even a rolling pin) to gently push the mint down into the lime juice.
Half fill the glass with crushed ice and pour in the rum. Stir the mix together until the sugar dissolves.
Top up with crushed ice, a splash of the sparkling water and garnish it with a sprig of mint.
